name: ExtraHop
description: Collect security detections and network events from ExtraHop Reveal(x) NDR platform. This integration provides comprehensive network-based threat visibility with MITRE ATT&CK context, including ML-based detection of lateral movement, data exfiltration, command and control, and other sophisticated attacks.

hostname.title: ExtraHop Hostname
hostname.description: ExtraHop appliance hostname or cloud tenant (e.g., extrahop.company.com or mytenant.api.cloud.extrahop.com)

api_key.title: API Key
api_key.description: ExtraHop REST API key (on-prem). Leave empty when using OAuth2.

client_id.title: OAuth2 Client ID
client_id.description: OAuth2 Client ID for RevealX 360 cloud authentication

client_secret.title: OAuth2 Client Secret
client_secret.description: OAuth2 Client Secret for RevealX 360 cloud authentication

verify_ssl.title: Verify SSL
verify_ssl.description: Verify SSL certificates when connecting to ExtraHop
